summary: Phase 2 frontend wizard for new patient intake passed all 23 assertions end-to-end. Wizard opens, 4-step indicator renders, step-level validation works (Step 1 required fields, Step 2 provider required), Back/Next/Cancel/Save all wired correctly, grouped backend payload shape is correct (demographics/contact/address/emergency_contact/admin/guarantor), POST /api/patients returned 201, created patient appears in the table, and search + unmask sanity still work. No reauth prompt was required for POST /api/patients (backend only enforces reauth on DELETE and POST records, per router.py).

issues: React dev warning: 'Select is changing from uncontrolled to controlled' — happens because value={form.assignedProviderId} starts as "" (empty string) and Radix Select treats empty string as uncontrolled. Cosmetic only, no functional impact. Consider using value={form.assignedProviderId || undefined} consistently (already done in SelectField wrapper but the Radix root still warns for the first render where value="" is passed into the Select component via value={value || undefined} correctly — warning likely comes from a different path). Low priority.

critical_code_review_comments: Patients.jsx is now 1219 lines — exceeds the 700-line guideline. Recommend splitting wizard into its own module (e.g., /pages/Patients/PatientWizardDialog.jsx, with steps in /pages/Patients/steps/*.jsx) to aid maintenance.
buildPayload() always emits `country` (default 'USA') because EMPTY_FORM.country='USA' and cleanStr keeps it; harmless but worth noting.
Minor React controlled/uncontrolled warning on Select components (see design_issues).
No test coverage for the wizard exists yet in /app/frontend — consider adding Jest/Playwright test for Phase 2 regression.
test_credentials: admin@ccms.app / Admin@ComplianceClinic1 — works, MFA not enforced for admin (Enable MFA banner shown).
seed_data_creation: One patient created via wizard: first_name='TestFirst147120', last_name='WizardTest', phone='555-100-2000'. Can be cleaned up via soft-delete if desired.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 wizard is fully functional. POST /api/patients does NOT require reauth (only DELETE patient and POST records do). AuthContext has a reauth() method but no global ReauthDialog is wired to wizard — not needed. 22 providers returned by /auth/providers. If re-testing, note that the Radix Select will emit a one-time controlled/uncontrolled warning — safe to ignore.
